description: Our payment processing is completely down. Customers are getting error 500 when trying to checkout. We're losing sales every minute this is down. This is affecting our entire e-commerce platform.
I need a copy of last month's invoice for my records. No rush, just need it for our accounting department by end of week.
The entire production database is down. All services are offline. Customers cannot access their accounts. This is a complete outage affecting thousands of users.
I'm having trouble changing my profile picture. It says the file is too large but I've tried different sizes. Can someone help when you get a chance?
Can you explain the difference between your Pro and Enterprise plans? I'm considering upgrading but want to understand the features first.
Security breach detected! Unauthorized access to admin panel. Multiple failed login attempts from unknown IPs. Need immediate assistance to secure the system.
There's a small typo on the pricing page - it says 'montly' instead of 'monthly'. Not urgent but thought you should know.
We were charged twice for the same subscription this month. Can you please review our billing and issue a refund for the duplicate charge?
